debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i ≠ j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
rw [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', WignerMeasure]
  have : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    rw [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  simp only [Matrix.of_apply, wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, ite_false]
  split_ifs <;> rw [Measure.map_eval_pi] <;> simp [wignerMeasureDist, h, h.symm]

have : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) :=
    fun p ↦ by dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap]
  dsimp [wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
  · exact (h h_eq).elim
  · rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist]
    simp [h_eq]
  · rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist]
    have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) (Ne.symm h_eq)
    simp [h_gt.ne]

simp [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, WignerMeasure]
  have hp : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> assumption
  split_ifs with h_lt
  · rw [Measure.map_eval_pi _ hp, wignerMeasureDist, if_neg (ne_of_lt h_lt)]
  · rw [Measure.map_eval_pi _ hp, wignerMeasureDist, if_neg (ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt h_lt) h.symm))]

haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> assumption
  simp only [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, Matrix.of_apply, h, ↓reduceIte]
  split_ifs with h_lt
  · simp [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, h_lt.ne, Measure.pi_map_eval]
  · have : j < i := h.lt_or_lt.resolve_left h_lt
    simp [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, this.ne, Measure.pi_map_eval]

haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) :=
    fun p ↦ by dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> assumption
  simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', h, WignerMeasure, HasLaw]
  split_ifs <;> simp [Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist, h]

simp [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h]
  haveI : ∀ k, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n k) := fun k ↦ by
    dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> assumption
  split_ifs <;> (rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]; simp [wignerMeasureDist, h, h.symm])

haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) :=
    fun p ↦ by dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  simp [HasLaw, WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h]
  split_ifs <;> simp [wignerMeasureDist, *, Measure.map_eval_pi]

simp [HasLaw, WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h]
  haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) :=
    fun p ↦ by dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> assumption
  split_ifs <;> (simp [wignerMeasureDist, h, h.symm]; apply Measure.map_eval_pi)

    · rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist, if_neg h]
    · rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist, if_neg h.symm]

have : ∀ k, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n k) :=
    fun k ↦ by unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> assumption
  rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with hlt | hgt
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), hlt.le⟩) :=
      funext (fun _ ↦ by simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, hlt, h])
    simp [HasLaw, WignerMeasure, this, Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist, h]
  · have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(j, i), hgt.le⟩) :=
      funext (fun _ ↦ by simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, hgt, h])
    simp [HasLaw, WignerMeasure, this, Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist, h.symm]
